# LUPO

> LUPO is the AI inbound SDR. One agentic brain across web form, email, chat, and phone: every inbound lead is captured, answered in seconds, filtered for noise, enriched and scored for buying intent, and either booked into a rep's calendar or kept away from sales. Marketing generates the demand. Reps close the deals. LUPO runs everything in between. LUPO is a product of Flair Technologies Ltd, London, UK.

Last updated: 2026-06-11

## Who LUPO is for

LUPO is for whoever owns inbound: sales, marketing, or RevOps. B2B teams that pay to generate demand and then leak it at the front door: calls that ring out, demo forms answered the next day, chats that die after the widget, junk leads eating rep time. Reps spend under a third of the week actually selling (Salesforce, State of Sales) and 73% of B2B leads arrive before they are sales-ready (MarketingSherpa). LUPO is the qualification layer that fixes both: noise filtered out, real buyers answered inside a minute and booked.

Primary buyers: heads of sales, heads of marketing and demand gen, RevOps leaders, and founders of B2B companies with real inbound volume, on HubSpot, Salesforce, or any CRM.

## What LUPO does

- **Web forms.** Channel-aware: high-intent forms get a callback inside sixty seconds; senior B2B buyers get a personal email reply instead (LUPO will never surprise-call a VP). Gated-content forms count. https://lupolabs.ai/channels/web-forms/
- **Inbound email.** Agentic email qualification: personal replies with a one-click booking link, two-way, same qualification policy as every channel. https://lupolabs.ai/channels/inbound-email/
- **Chat.** Your existing widget (Intercom, Drift, HubSpot Chat, or custom) hands off; LUPO qualifies and books inside the same chat. https://lupolabs.ai/channels/chat/
- **Inbound phone.** Answers on the second ring, 24/7. Qualifies the caller live, checks real calendar availability, books the meeting on the call. Buying signals stated on the call feed intent scoring. The inbound channel almost nobody else covers. https://lupolabs.ai/channels/inbound-phone/
- **Enrichment.** Every lead enriched with firmographics, technographics, and decision-maker title through proprietary data partnerships.
- **Buying-intent scoring.** Funding, M&A, leadership hires, headcount growth, and category-specific triggers. Fit tells you who; intent tells you when. https://lupolabs.ai/glossary/intent-scoring/
- **Filtering.** Vendors politely declined and logged. Tyre-kickers logged for marketing, kept away from sales. Support requests routed to the right team with context. Wrong-fit prospects disqualified without burning rep time.
- **Booking and routing.** Real events in Google Calendar and Microsoft 365 / Outlook (both live). Round-robin or rules-based routing by territory, product line, seniority, or intent score. https://lupolabs.ai/glossary/lead-routing/
- **CRM sync.** Every qualified contact, transcript, summary, intent score, and booking written to HubSpot or Salesforce automatically; any CRM reachable by webhook connects on request. https://lupolabs.ai/integrations/
- **Slack alerts.** Qualified-lead and booking pings with one-click full context.
- **Dashboard.** Channels, intent bands, noise filtered, meetings booked, time-to-first-action: measured on your own inbound from week one.

## Pricing

Public and stated upfront: 3,000 to 15,000 USD per month depending on inbound volume and integrations. 30-day founder-led pilot with agreed success criteria, fully live in 4 to 8 weeks. https://lupolabs.ai/pricing/

## Positioning

LUPO is an AI inbound SDR: it makes real-time decisions about which question to ask, when to check the calendar, when to book, when to escalate to a human, and when to close politely. It is a qualification layer, with chat as one intake of four. It does no cold outbound. Outbound AI SDRs (11x, Artisan, Regie) and voice-only receptionists (Air, PolyAI) solve different jobs; chat widgets (Intercom, Drift heritage, HubSpot Chat) are integration partners that hand off to LUPO. The closest comparisons are Qualified (Piper), built for the Salesforce ecosystem, and Spara, which leads with instant engagement on voice, email, chat, and text; LUPO is the CRM-flexible alternative with native HubSpot support, live phone coverage, and enrichment plus buying-intent scoring on every lead. Honest comparisons: https://lupolabs.ai/compare/

## Integrations, live today

CRM: HubSpot, Salesforce (any CRM by webhook on request). Calendar: Google Calendar, Microsoft 365 / Outlook. Alerts: Slack. Chat handoffs: Intercom, Drift, HubSpot Chat (HMAC-signed), any custom chat or form via webhook. SMS: A2P 10DLC registered. Voice infrastructure: Vapi runtime, Deepgram transcription, ElevenLabs voices.

## Trust and compliance

UK GDPR compliant; DPA at https://lupolabs.ai/dpa.html. Encryption in transit; conversations are never used to train external AI models. SOC 2 and HIPAA attestations are on the roadmap as design partners require them. Currently onboarding the first ten founding customers, configured hand-in-hand with each team.

## About the team

LUPO was founded in 2025 by Tom Baxter and is a product of Flair Technologies Ltd, London. Tom holds an MPhil in Physics from the University of Cambridge and runs every pilot personally. LUPO is an ElevenLabs Grant recipient and builds on Deepgram. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/luposales/

## Frequently asked questions

**Is this just a chatbot?** LUPO is a qualification layer across calls, web forms, chat handoffs, and email; chat is one intake channel of four. Your existing chat widget stays and hands off to LUPO when a visitor is ready.

**Is LUPO for sales or marketing?** Whoever owns inbound. Marketing gets control and visibility over the leads it worked hard to generate; sales only sees real buyers.

**How fast do meetings get booked?** Sub-2-minute median time-to-first-action on qualified inbound, measured in the dashboard. The research benchmark: responding within 5 minutes makes contact 21x more likely (Oldroyd, Harvard Business Review).

**Does it work with our stack?** HubSpot and Salesforce sync, Slack alerts, Google Calendar and Microsoft 365 / Outlook booking are live today. Anything that can post a webhook can hand leads to LUPO.

**What does it cost?** 3,000 to 15,000 USD per month, stated upfront. 30-day founder-led pilot.

## Try LUPO

- **Talk to LUPO live, right now**: tap "Talk to LUPO live" on https://lupolabs.ai and speak to the agent in your browser. You can switch its voice on the same panel. By starting a call, you agree LUPO may record, transcribe, and analyse the conversation.
- **Book a 20-minute demo with the founder**: https://cal.com/tombaxter/lupo
